description: Experimental African-language bridge eval set (Phase 6D). Questions mirror the English SME eval intents so bridged answers can be checked against the same documents. Used only when FEATURE_AFRICAN_LANG=true.

questions.question: Kí ni àkókò ìsanwó nínú àdéhùn olùpèsè?
questions.english_reference: What is the payment period in the supplier agreement?

questions.question: Ọjọ́ mélòó ni àwọn oníbàárà ní láti dá ọjà tí kò ṣí padà?
questions.english_reference: How many days do customers have to return unopened retail items?

questions.question: Menene lokacin biyan kudi a cikin yarjejeniyar mai kaya?
questions.english_reference: What is the payment period in the supplier agreement?

questions.question: Kwanaki nawa abokan ciniki suke da su don mayar da kayan da ba a bude ba?
questions.english_reference: How many days do customers have to return unopened items?

questions.question: Je, muda wa malipo katika mkataba wa msambazaji ni nini?
questions.english_reference: What is the payment period in the supplier agreement?

questions.question: Wateja wana siku ngapi za kurudisha bidhaa ambazo hazijafunguliwa?
questions.english_reference: How many days do customers have to return unopened items?
